overview: Cenegenics provides personalized health assessment and ongoing care focused on improving healthspan and longevity through precision diagnostics and biometric testing. Services include in-home phlebotomy, physician consultations, and a dedicated performance health team.
highlights: Dedicated team includes physician, performance coach, coordinator, and phlebotomist
targetAudience: Individuals seeking preventive health optimization and detailed understanding of biomarkers related to aging and longevity.
